9-3.evidence_quote: I'm organising this event for around 20 people... renting <REDACTED> in Sep and 5-6 people, who are agreed to do this

10-1.evidence_quote: Here's a roadmap of actions to help you organize your event for around 20 people at a villa in September:

10-2.evidence_quote: Finalize the list of attendees: Reach out to potential participants... and confirm their interest and availability

10-3.evidence_quote: Choose the villa: Research and select an appropriate villa that can accommodate around 20 people comfortably.

10-4.evidence_quote: Book the villa: Once you have chosen the villa, make a reservation... Ensure that you understand the booking terms

10-5.evidence_quote: Create an event schedule: Develop a detailed itinerary... Allow for some flexibility and downtime

10-6.evidence_quote: Coordinate transportation: Organize group transportation to and from the villa

10-7.evidence_quote: Plan meals and refreshments: Develop a meal plan... accommodate any dietary restrictions or preferences.

10-8.evidence_quote: Organize activity materials and equipment: Compile a list of materials and equipment needed for each activity

10-9.evidence_quote: Delegate tasks: Assign specific tasks or roles to attendees

10-10.evidence_quote: Communicate with attendees: Regularly update attendees on the event plans... Provide a packing list

10-11.evidence_quote: Collect payments: If necessary, collect payments... Provide a clear breakdown of costs and payment deadlines.

10-12.evidence_quote: Prepare a contingency plan: Develop a contingency plan to address potential issues

10-13.evidence_quote: Finalize details: In the weeks leading up to the event, confirm all reservations, transportation arrangements, and activity plans.

10-14.evidence_quote: By following this roadmap... Remember to remain flexible and open to feedback
